title: Accessible Reader Surface, Untrusted Content, and Safe Links · Language Lens: Feed Go Reflow Motion Media
summary: The UI injects feed HTML, opens deceptive links, depends on card color, loses focus after updates, hides source context, and forces infinite scroll. Predict the reader decision, feed or API contract, Go and PostgreSQL ownership, bounded failure, and observable evidence before reading the governing source. Planned artifact: Add and verify the feed go reflow motion media increment in keyboard-first content-safe feed reader. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case pract…
objectives: Support narrow reflow, zoom, reduced motion, non-color state, image alternatives, content warnings, and user-controlled media.
Support complete keyboard flow, visible focus, large targets, announced refresh and errors, and stable focus after dynamic updates.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: Feed aggregation and Go Predict Feed Go Reflow Motion Media · Theory Feed Go Reflow Motion Media
steps.instruction:
theory case — A theory Go team handles case 2107 during a PostgreSQL claim and failover drill. Browser Go uses pure bounded models and original RSS, Atom, HTTP, PostgreSQL, and reader fixtures only.
